tools.name: list_missions
tools.description: List all projects/missions the user can access, grouped by kind (client missions, internal builds, team projects).

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks of one mission by its key (e.g. TEL, MODJ). Set include_done to also show completed tasks.

tools.name: today
tools.description: MY tasks due today or overdue (assigned to me). To see a whole mission's tasks incl. others' or unassigned work, use list_tasks by mission name.

tools.name: my_tasks
tools.description: Open tasks assigned to the current user, across all their missions.

tools.name: add_task
tools.description: Create a task in a mission. priority p1/p2/p3; due_date (YYYY-MM-DD, +Nd, today/tomorrow, or a weekday like Friday); assignee is a teammate's name (matched fuzzily); tags is an array of strings.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Edit an existing task by reference (e.g. TEL-12). Set any of: due_date (YYYY-MM-DD / +Nd / today / tomorrow / weekday, or null to clear), priority (p1/p2/p3), title, assignee (teammate name). Only the fields you pass are changed.

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task done by its reference (e.g. TEL-12).

tools.name: start_task
tools.description: Move a task to 'doing' by its reference (e.g. TEL-12).

tools.name: postpone_task
tools.description: Change a task's due date. 'when' is +Nd (e.g. +3d), 'monday', or a YYYY-MM-DD date. Increments the postpone count.

tools.name: comment_task
tools.description: Add a comment to a task. Set is_question true to flag it as a question (routes to the admin inbox with attribution).

tools.name: new_mission
tools.description: Create a new project. kind is 'client' (client mission), 'internal' (internal build), or 'team' (shared team project). key is an optional 3-letter uppercase code.

tools.name: log_extra_hours
tools.description: Log extra work hours (evenings/weekends — always counted as production). Optionally attribute to a mission key.

tools.name: calendar
tools.description: Your Google Calendar events for the next N days (default 7). Shows time, title, and attendee count.

tools.name: upcoming_meetings
tools.description: Your upcoming meetings (calendar events that have other attendees) for the next N days (default 3).

tools.name: inbox
tools.description: Your triage inbox: pending client requests and open questions awaiting a decision, with their urgency.

tools.name: list_comments
tools.description: Read the comments/discussion thread on a task by its reference (e.g. TEL-12).

tools.name: show_task
tools.description: Show one task in full — its description/notes, status, priority, urgency, due date, assignee, provenance (source) and the comment thread. Use this to read the context behind a task, especially head-of-mission and customer requests.

tools.name: accept_request
tools.description: Accept a client request from the inbox (task ref). Optionally set priority (p1/p2/p3) and a due date (YYYY-MM-DD).

tools.name: postpone_request
tools.description: Postpone a client request with a written reason and a resurface date (when: +Nd, monday, or YYYY-MM-DD). The reason is shown to the client.

tools.name: decline_request
tools.description: Decline a client request. Reason is optional (e.g. 'Doublon'). Shown to the client if given.

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Permanently delete a task (DESTRUCTIVE, no undo). ALWAYS confirm the exact task with the user first. Without confirm=true this returns a preview instead of deleting — never pass confirm=true unless the user has explicitly agreed to delete this specific task.

tools.name: set_urgency
tools.description: Set a task's urgency: normale, haute, or critique.

tools.name: set_task_visibility
tools.description: Set whether a task is visible to the client in the customer portal, by task ref (e.g. TEL-12). client:true shows it to the client, false hides it.

task relations.name: link_tasks
task relations.description: Create a relation between two tasks. type 'blocks' means task_ref blocks other_ref; type 'related' links them.

task relations.name: show_relations
task relations.description: Show what a task blocks, what blocks it, and related tasks.

mission detail + notes.name: show_mission
mission detail + notes.description: Full detail of one mission by key: client, head, dates, goal, status, links, team members, and task counts.

mission detail + notes.name: update_mission
mission detail + notes.description: Edit a mission's fields by key. Set any of: name, status (active/paused/completed/archived), phase (e.g. setup/live), head (a teammate's name — assigns the head of mission; empty string clears it), client_company, start_date, end_date (YYYY-MM-DD / +Nd / weekday, or null to clear), goal, slack_url, notion_url, dashboard_url, customer_language (fr/en — drives portal + client emails), mission_type, visibility (team/private), color (#hex). Only the fields you pass change.

mission detail + notes.name: list_notes
mission detail + notes.description: List the notes on a mission (by key).

mission detail + notes.name: add_note
mission detail + notes.description: Add a note to a mission. client_visible defaults false (internal).

mission files.name: list_files
mission files.description: List the files attached to a mission (by key): filename, size, type, and who can see them (head/client).

mission files.name: get_file
mission files.description: Get a temporary download link for a mission file, matched by filename (fuzzy). The link expires in 5 minutes.

mission files.name: upload_file
mission files.description: Upload a local file to a mission. file_path is a path on the user's machine. By default the file is internal; set visible_to_head / visible_to_client to share it. Confirm the path with the user if unsure.

mission files.name: delete_file
mission files.description: Delete a file from a mission by filename (fuzzy). Removes both the stored object and the record. Destructive — confirm the exact file with the user first.

mission members.name: add_collaborator
mission members.description: Add a teammate (by name) as a collaborator on a mission. Owner/admin only (enforced by permissions).

mission members.name: request_access
mission members.description: Request access to a mission you're not a member of (by key). Notifies the owner.

head requests.name: create_request
head requests.description: Create a request to the mission's engineer (used by heads of mission). kind: 'task' (do this), 'question', or 'meeting'. 'when' is free text like 'demain' or 'avant vendredi'. Lands in the engineer's inbox.

head requests.name: reply_request
head requests.description: Reply to an open head request on a mission, matched by a phrase in its title.

head requests.name: resolve_request
head requests.description: Mark an open head request resolved (matched by a phrase in its title).

time summary.name: time_summary
time summary.description: This week's time: meeting hours (from calendar) vs production, extra hours logged, and the production ratio (target ≥ 66%).

playbooks.name: show_playbook
playbooks.description: Show a playbook's steps by title (fuzzy match).

playbooks.name: apply_playbook
playbooks.description: Apply a playbook to a mission — creates its steps as tasks in that mission. playbook by title (fuzzy), mission by key.

stack.name: list_stack
stack.description: List a tool stack, grouped by category. No argument → the global team stack (Bulldozer's own tools). With mission_key → that mission's customer stack (the tools the client uses).

stack.name: show_tool
stack.description: Show a stack tool's full detail + credentials by name (fuzzy). No mission_key → global team stack; with mission_key → that mission's customer stack. Shows head/client visibility, who uses it, and each credential's fill status (filled value vs awaiting the client). Credentials are returned only if your role allows it (RLS: admin, or engineer assigned to that mission).

stack.name: add_stack_tool
stack.description: Add a tool to a stack. No mission_key → the global team stack (Bulldozer's own tools — you can set monthly_cost/billing_cycle/currency). With mission_key → that mission's customer stack. category: enrichment/outbound/crm/infra/ai/other. Requires admin, or an engineer assigned to the mission.

stack.name: add_stack_credential
stack.description: Add a credential to a stack tool (found by name). No mission_key → searches the global team stack; with mission_key → that mission's stack. kind is api_key/login/password/workspace_url/token/other. Leave value empty on a mission tool to create a client-fill slot — set instructions. Requires admin, or an engineer on the mission.

activity.name: activity
activity.description: Recent activity across missions (tasks created/completed/postponed/deleted, triage decisions), grouped by mission — the source for a weekly recap. Optional mission_key to scope; days sets the window (default 7).

mission tools: Gantt & RACI.name: list_mission_tools
mission tools: Gantt & RACI.description: List a mission's Gantt charts and RACI tables (with their client/head visibility).

mission tools: Gantt & RACI.name: show_mission_tool
mission tools: Gantt & RACI.description: Show a mission's Gantt or RACI by title (fuzzy) — renders the full matrix / timeline.

mission tools: Gantt & RACI.name: add_mission_tool
mission tools: Gantt & RACI.description: Create a new Gantt chart or RACI table on a mission. kind is 'gantt' or 'raci'.

mission tools: Gantt & RACI.name: raci_set
mission tools: Gantt & RACI.description: Set a RACI cell: the role (R/A/C/I, or empty to clear) for a person on a deliverable. Auto-creates the deliverable row and/or the person column if missing — build the matrix incrementally by calling this repeatedly.

mission tools: Gantt & RACI.name: gantt_set_task
mission tools: Gantt & RACI.description: Add or update a Gantt task/bar by label. Dates YYYY-MM-DD; progress 0-100; depends_on is the label of another task in this chart (dependents auto-shift in the app UI).

mission tools: Gantt & RACI.name: set_tool_visibility
mission tools: Gantt & RACI.description: Toggle a mission tool's visibility: client (visible to the customer in the portal) and/or head_editable (the head of mission can edit it).

mission tools: Gantt & RACI.name: delete_mission_tool
mission tools: Gantt & RACI.description: Delete a Gantt or RACI from a mission by title (fuzzy). Destructive — confirm the title with the user first.

skills library.name: add_skill
skills library.description: Upload a skill to the Skills library from the terminal. Provide the SKILL.md via `file` (a local path — it is read from disk) or `content` (raw markdown). Private by default; set publish:true to share it with the team. name is required.

skills library.name: list_skills
skills library.description: List skills — your own plus the team's published skills. ◆ = published, ◇ = private.

skills library.name: show_skill
skills library.description: Show a skill's full detail and SKILL.md content by name (fuzzy).

skills library.name: publish_skill
skills library.description: Publish a skill to the team library (or unpublish with published:false) by name (fuzzy).

emails.name: list_emails
emails.description: List your ranked emails from the aggregator (status=new, highest importance first). Filters: needs_reply (only those needing a reply), category (client/sales/internal/personal/notification), mission_key, limit (default 20).

emails.name: show_email
emails.description: Show one email in full by search term (sender or subject) or message id.

emails.name: suggest_reply
emails.description: Get an AI-suggested reply draft + key points for an email (by search term or id).

emails.name: reply_email
emails.description: Send a reply to an email (by search term or id) as you, in-thread, via Gmail. Marks it handled. reply_all sends to all thread recipients.

emails.name: mark_email
emails.description: Set an email's status: handled, snoozed, dismissed, or new (by search term or id).

emails.name: delete_email
emails.description: Delete an email from the aggregator (by search term or id). Destructive.

playbook authoring.name: add_playbook_step
playbook authoring.description: Add a step to a playbook (found by title, fuzzy). Appended at the end.

recap.name: recap
recap.description: What got shipped: tasks completed in the last N days (default 7), grouped by mission.

stack edit / delete.name: update_stack_tool
stack edit / delete.description: Edit a stack tool (by name; no mission_key = general team stack, with mission_key = that mission's stack). Set any of: url, description, category (enrichment/outbound/crm/infra/ai/other), docs_url, how_to_use, monthly_cost, billing_cycle (monthly/yearly/one_time/free), currency, visible_to_head, visible_to_client.

stack edit / delete.name: delete_stack_tool
stack edit / delete.description: Delete a stack tool and its credentials (by name; mission_key for a mission's stack). Destructive.

stack edit / delete.name: update_stack_credential
stack edit / delete.description: Edit a credential on a stack tool (tool by name, credential by label). Set value, instructions, url, and/or kind (api_key/login/password/workspace_url/token/other).

stack edit / delete.name: delete_stack_credential
stack edit / delete.description: Delete a credential from a stack tool (tool by name, credential by label). Destructive.

recipes.name: list_recipes
recipes.description: List recipes — your own plus the team's published ones. ◆ published, ◇ private.

recipes.name: show_recipe
recipes.description: Show a recipe's contents by title (fuzzy).

recipes.name: add_recipe
recipes.description: Create a recipe. For a task recipe pass tasks (array of task titles); for a note recipe pass body. Private by default; publish:true shares it with the team.

recipes.name: apply_recipe
recipes.description: Apply a recipe to a mission — materializes its tasks into the mission (or creates its note). recipe by title, mission by key.

recipes.name: publish_recipe
recipes.description: Publish a recipe to the team library (or unpublish with published:false), by title.

personal space.name: add_perso_task
personal space.description: Add a private task to your personal space (Perso). priority p1/p2/p3; due_date YYYY-MM-DD / +Nd / weekday.

personal space.name: perso_today
personal space.description: Your open (not done) tasks in your private personal space (Perso).

personal space.name: add_perso_note
personal space.description: Add a private note to your personal space (Perso).

skills: import from GitHub.name: import_skill
skills: import from GitHub.description: Import a skill from a PUBLIC GitHub URL — a raw SKILL.md URL or a github.com blob URL (auto-converted to raw). Downloads it, parses frontmatter (name/description), adds it to your library. Private by default; publish:true shares it.

improvements.name: log_improvement
improvements.description: Log an improvement idea / feedback for the tools or process.

calendar write.name: create_event
calendar write.description: Create a Google Calendar event on your calendar. start/end are ISO datetimes (e.g. 2026-07-10T15:00:00). guests is an array of emails. Invitees are notified.
